comments.author: @ajaybhardwaj3065
comments.text: Ye road aj b vaisa hi hai .Cost badti ja Rahi hai .Thekedar and mantri sab khush hai.Yadi aisa hi raha to ye India ka abandoned bypass road declare ho jana chahiye .Ek railway under bridge inse ni ban pa raha hai .Center or state mai BJP govt hai tab bhi.Shame on both railways and NHAI.

methodology: YouTube Data API v3 search for the project name (India region). Top 3 videos by relevance; top 20 comments per video.
